testimonials.title: Trusted by Leading Organizations
testimonials.subtitle: See what our customers say about CredSure

quotes.quote: The CredSure Dashboard is a one-stop shop for all certification needs, which is very helpful for institutions like us who specialize in training services. CredSure brings a new and updated approach to Certification.
quotes.author: Francis Glenn T.

quotes.quote: Held a coding hackathon for 200+ students, the ease of issuing certificates was amazing. Best part was these were blockchain certificates so had a QR code for authenticity and could publish the same on their social accounts.
quotes.author: Sanjiv D.

quotes.quote: Over 7000 certificates needed to be created and sent out. The team from CredSure provided us with amazing support - right from a great onboarding experience, to the team working over the weekend to make the certificates go out on time. Wonderful Service!
quotes.author: Subhayu R.

quotes.quote: Agile Team set up, top management attention for our individual needs, co-creation with the team, enthusiastic and highly skilled team members. Dedicated to achieving highest customer business impact. Customer-centric blockchain certificate professionals!
quotes.author: Nils R.

quotes.quote: Once the certificates are created as a template the issuing process is very simple and user-friendly. Specially the bulk processing on their system is super simple. Certs are encrypted and authenticated. Easy to use and convenient for bulk certificate requirements.
quotes.author: Zoya N.

quotes.quote: It is easy to use or issue certificates quickly. Issuing certs/badges are seamless. The Great product, and a great support team! Good to understand and very simple to implement.
quotes.author: Ramesh N.

faqSection.title: Frequently Asked
faqSection.subtitle: Everything you need to know about CredSure.

items.question: Are the credentials secure and verifiable?
items.answer: Yes! All credentials are blockchain-anchored with bank-level encryption and ISO 27001 certification. Each credential has a unique verification URL that anyone can check instantly without login.

items.question: How long does it take to get started?
items.answer: Most organizations issue their first credentials within 2 hours. Our intuitive template editor requires no technical expertise or design skills.

items.question: Can recipients add credentials to their digital wallets?
items.answer: Absolutely! Recipients can add credentials to Apple Wallet and Google Pay with one click. They can also share directly to LinkedIn, download as PDF, or embed in portfolios.

items.question: What integrations do you support?
items.answer: We integrate with popular LMS platforms (Moodle, Canvas, Blackboard, Thinkific), CRMs (Salesforce, HubSpot), automation tools (Zapier, Make), and offer full REST API access.

items.question: Is there a free trial? What's included?
items.answer: Yes! We offer a 14-day free trial with full access to Professional plan features. No credit card required. You can issue up to 100 credentials during the trial.

items.question: Do you have a free plan?
items.answer: Yes! Our free plan includes up to 25 credentials per month, basic templates, email delivery, social sharing, and blockchain verification.

items.question: What makes CredSure different from free certificate makers?
items.answer: Unlike free PDF generators, CredSure credentials are verifiable, blockchain-secured, trackable, and shareable. You get analytics, LinkedIn integration, and digital wallet support.
